candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line with populated values across years; preferred over header rows and total duplicates.

Section/header, not a numeric line item.

COGS, not revenue.

candidates.why: Direct cost line but appears to be only part of total cost of revenues, not the full COGS.
A component of COGS, not full COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Revenue including Operation & Maintenance (Utility) - Total
candidates.why: Appears to duplicate Cost of Revenues - Total; less standard label.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Clear SG&A component and excludes COGS/interest/taxes; best component-level overhead row available.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, but it is a subtotal/aggregate rather than a component; rules prefer component rows over subtotal rows when components exist.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization should be excluded from XSGA components per rules.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: A component-level SG&A row exists, so preferred it over the subtotal-like explicit SG&A row. Excluded amortization per instructions.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Indicates R&D may be excluded from SG&A, but does not itself report R&D expense.

variables.notes: No direct R&D expense line is present in the provided statements. The only R&D-related candidate is amortization of capitalized R&D, which should not be used as current R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best pure interest expense line; preferred over gross financing or lease-specific alternatives.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Would be relevant if populated, but appears unpopulated and less broadly representative.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Only a lease-interest component, not total interest expense.
Good direct interest expense line; appears equivalent to net of capitalized interest in available years.
Acceptable fallback net finance interest line if gross interest expense is unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Provided as a priority list per XINT rule: preferred pure interest expense first, then alternate direct label, then net-of-interest-income fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Debt Percentage of Total Equity
candidates.why: Ratio, not a balance sheet equity amount.

variables.notes: No Balance Sheet preview is provided, so no valid equity amount row can be identified from the supplied sheets. The only candidate is a ratio, not book equity. Manual review needed once Balance Sheet rows are available.

candidates.row_label: Total Assets to Total Shareholders Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Ratio, not minority interest amount.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income subtotal, not balance sheet minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income attribution amount, not balance sheet non-controlling interest.
